verified.notes: Wyoming State Parks offers senior discounts for ages 62+. No income or asset limits found in official sources. Senior lifetime pass price increased to $80 as of 2026 (previously $10). Phone number is for Wyoming Department of State Parks and Cultural Resources main contact. Program appears active as of April 2026.
